name: h-series-skills
description: Skills for the H-Series on Hedera: discover and register agentic services on H-Index (the capability registry for the agentic economy), and produce verifiable two-party proof-of-execution receipts via H-Seal with zero code.

plugins.name: h-series
plugins.description: Discover and register agentic services (MCP servers, x402-paid APIs, agent tools) on H-Index, and anchor proof-of-execution receipts on H-Seal. Built on Hedera Consensus Service.
